case_title: STEVEN MICHAEL PHILLIPS et al VS. KEN SWEENEY et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-10-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SWEENEY, KEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-03-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-03-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. LUCY SWEENEY WAIVES SERVICE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SWEENEY, KEN SWEENEY, LUCY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT PHILLIPS, STEVEN MICHAEL LY, HUI MEI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2009 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2009 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PHILLIPS, STEVEN MICHAEL LY, HUI MEI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SWEENEY, KEN SWEENEY, LUCY $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $900.00, COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANTS FAILED TO ALLOW PLAINTIFFS ANY OPPORTUNITY TO REMEDY DEFECTS; HOWEVER ITS UNDISPUTED THAT THERE WAS SOME DAMAGE.
